headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $308
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vikram Malhorta   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $285 to $308.
